SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[CreatedAt], [o0].[DiscountAmount], [o0].[EmployeeId], [o0].[Notes], [o0].[OrderDate], [o0].[OrderNo], [o0].[PaymentMethod], [o0].[Status], [o0].[TotalAmount], [o0].[UpdatedAt], [e].[Id], [s].[Id], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[Discount], [s].[LineTotal], [s].[OrderId], [s].[ProductId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[RefundedQuantity], [s].[UnitPrice], [s].[Id0], [s].[Barcode], [s].[CategoryId], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[ImageUrl], [s].[LowStockThreshold], [s].[Name], [s].[Price], [s].[Stock], [e].[CreatedAt], [e].[Email], [e].[HireDate], [e].[IsActive], [e].[Name], [e].[Phone], [e].[Position], [e].[Salary], [e].[UpdatedAt], [e].[UserId]
FROM (
    SELECT [o].[Id], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[DiscountAmount], [o].[EmployeeId], [o].[Notes], [o].[OrderDate], [o].[OrderNo], [o].[PaymentMethod], [o].[Status], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    ORDER BY [o].[OrderDate] DESC
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [o0]
INNER JOIN [Employees] AS [e] ON [o0].[EmployeeId] = [e].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o1].[Id], [o1].[CreatedAt], [o1].[Discount], [o1].[LineTotal], [o1].[OrderId], [o1].[ProductId], [o1].[Quantity], [o1].[RefundedQuantity], [o1].[UnitPrice], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[LowStockThreshold], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Stock]
    FROM [OrderItems] AS [o1]
    INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [o1].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [o0].[Id] = [s].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [o0].[OrderDate] DESC, [o0].[Id], [e].[Id], [s].[Id]

    FROM [OrderItems] AS [o]
    INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [o].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s]
GROUP BY [s].[ProductId], [s].[Name0]
ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM([s].[Quantity]), 0) DESC

SELECT TOP(@p) [s].[ProductId], [s].[Name0] AS [Name], COALESCE(SUM([s].[Quantity]), 0) AS [QuantitySold], COALESCE(SUM([s].[LineTotal]), 0.0) AS [Revenue]
FROM (
    SELECT [o].[LineTotal], [o].[ProductId], [o].[Quantity], [p].[Name] AS [Name0]
    FROM [OrderItems] AS [o]
    INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [o].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s]
GROUP BY [s].[ProductId], [s].[Name0]
ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM([s].[Quantity]), 0) DESC
